headline: McKesson (MCK) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Rebound And Mixed Fundamental Signals
summary: McKesson stock reaction and recent performance snapshot McKesson (MCK) has drawn investor attention after recent price moves, with the stock up about 4% over the past week and about 4% over the past month, despite a roughly 16% decline over the past 3 months. Against this backdrop, the share price recently closed at US$775.66. The company reported revenue of US$403.43b and net income of US$4.76b, giving investors a large, established healthcare distributor to assess. See our latest analysis...
